senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: one issue of a newspaper or magazine
senses.example: The morning edition had the story on page one

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: a revised version of a book published again
senses.example: The new edition adds photos and corrects errors

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: a picture in a book, magazine, or paper
senses.example: Each illustration shows a bird with bright colors

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: an example that makes an idea clear
senses.example: This story is an illustration of real courage

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: the act of drawing pictures for a book
senses.example: She studied illustration and now draws for children

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: The act of making something new or causing it to exist
senses.example: The creation of this app took six months

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: Something made, especially an artistic or unusual thing
senses.example: This painting is her best creation so far

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: In the Bible, the making of the world by God
senses.example: They learned about the Creation in school

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: An invented story, often with adventure and action
senses.example: He told a tale about pirates and storms

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: A story that may be untrue, used as an explanation
senses.example: She made up a tale about missing the bus

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: Chasing and killing wild animals as a sport or for food
senses.example: Hunting is not allowed in this national park

senses.label: n. B2
senses.definition: the activity of trying to find a job, home, etc., used in compounds like job-hunting
senses.example: Apartment hunting takes time and a lot of patience

senses.label: n. A2
senses.definition: a secret word or group of characters used to enter an account or system
senses.example: Use a strong password to protect your account

senses.label: n. A2
senses.definition: a name used to identify yourself when you enter a website or app
senses.example: Enter your username before you type your password
